other_observers: Duane Nelson; Duane Nelson found the bird earlier in the day. Several people saw it in the following months.
specific_location: At the west end of John Martin Reservoir
description: An all white bird with long legs and a straight, long, thin heavy bill. It was quite a bit smaller than Great Blue Heron, but still appeared to be a fairly large bird. It had dark greenish gray legs and feet. It had a mostly dark bill. It also had dark lores.Behaviors: We saw it both just standing around in shallow water and also watched it actively feeding. When it was actively feeding it would mostly be dancing around with its wings held out running around and then thrust at something in the water.Call: Didn’t hear itPlumage: White morph Juvenile
